failing_first.result: 3 failed before route implementation; new paths returned 405 instead of the contract statuses

transcribe.input: multipart session_id, optional session_token, optional participant_id, audio
transcribe.first_turn: unknown session without token is ephemeral and does not create chat state or storage
transcribe.known_session: chat.owns_session is required; missing or invalid token returns 401

synthesize.known_session: chat.owns_session is required when session_id identifies an existing session
synthesize.failure_behavior: provider failure leaves existing chat response and turn state unchanged

adversarial_classes.malformed_input: covered: malformed ids, missing multipart fields, empty/corrupt audio, oversized audio, text limits
adversarial_classes.prompt_injection: not_applicable: T3 provider output is validated and never sent to chat/LLM
adversarial_classes.cancel_resume: not_applicable: no provider lifecycle or long-running job state in T3
adversarial_classes.hung_long_command: not_applicable: no subprocess or provider lifecycle in T3
adversarial_classes.stale_state: covered: ephemeral transcribe leaves no conversation/audio files
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: covered: protected hashes and dirty paths captured; unrelated changes preserved
adversarial_classes.flaky_tests: not_observed: deterministic local TestClient and generated WAV fixtures
adversarial_classes.misleading_success_output: covered: assertions check HTTP status, stable body code, headers, and filesystem state

cleanup.temporary_audio: request-scoped UploadFile closed in finally; manual temp directory auto-removed
cleanup.conversation_storage: no first-turn conversation file or chat session created
cleanup.network: no network provider call; default provider is unavailable
cleanup.git: no reset, checkout, stash, delete, push, PR, merge, or amend
cleanup.verifier_gap: ruff and basedpyright unavailable in the local environment
